home.title: Quirky cafe with performances, garden terrace and democratic prices
home.about: Welcome to Molotov, where every evening is an adventure waiting to unfold. Located in the heart of Ghent, we're more than just a bar. We're a haven for those looking for something different. We believe that good times shouldn't come at a hefty price. That's why we're proud to offer affordable prices that make quality drinks and entertainment accessible to everyone. Whether you're a student on a budget or a seasoned connoisseur, you'll find something to enjoy on our menu without breaking the bank.
